description: Inventory of a part of a drugstore prepared by Shelomo b. Eliyyahu. 1229 CE. Itemized account for the sum owed by Sulaymān. Among various vessels (many burniyyas), mentions jars (qaṭramīzāt) containing sour grapes with mint (ḥiṣrim munaʿnaʿ), plantain syrup (sharābl lisān ḥamal), Syrian rhubarb (ribās), cassia fistula (khiyār shanbar), and pomegranate oxymel (sakanjabīn rummānī). On verso also mentions Yaʿqūb al-Bayyāʿ and provides instructions for dividing all of the goods into two equal shares.
description_he: מלאי חלק מחנות תרופות שהכין שלמה בן אליהו; 1229 לספירה; כולל כלים ותכולה: ענבים חמוצים עם נענע, שרבט לשון הכבש, ריבס סורי ועוד
